ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Grok订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aldinokemal/go-whatsapp-web-multidevice
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aldinokemal/go-whatsapp-web-multidevice
Language: go
GOWA - WhatsApp REST API with support for UI, Multi Account, Webhooks, and MCP, and Chatwoot. Built with Golang for efficient memory use.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/open-code-review
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/open-code-review
Language: go
Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anchore/syft
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anchore/syft
Language: go
CLI tool and library for generating a Software Bill of Materials from container images and filesystems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ava-labs/avalanchego
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ava-labs/avalanchego
Language: go
Go implementation of an Avalanche node.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ethereum-optimism/optimism
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ethereum-optimism/optimism
Language: go
Optimism is Ethereum, scaled.

URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/beads
Language: go
Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hatchet-dev/hatchet
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: influxdata/telegraf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf
Language: go
Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maximhq/bifrost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maximhq/bifrost
Language: go
Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: samber/lo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/samber/lo
Language: go
💥 A Lodash-style Go library based on Go 1.18+ Generics (map, filter, contains, find...)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: schollz/croc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/schollz/croc
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seaweedfs/seaweedfs
Language: go
SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.
